feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: In Every Life, In Every Moment
entry.summary:
Author: Im_a_hoe_for_angst

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,529Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 0

Summary: "Hearts are wild things, that's why our ribs are cages."⋆｡°✩“Turn on the TV. Channel Four.” You blink blearily at your alarm clock on your nightstand. It reads 3:26 AM. Maybe you’re still asleep, because there's no way you’re hearing whoever’s voice is sounding on the other end. Maybe you’re hallucinating.“Jason?? Is that you? What-““Shira, please.”A pause. You hear his ragged breaths on the other side of the line. You consider hanging up. Your voice comes out low, angry.“You got real nerve, you know that? Son of a… argh! Fine!”You turn on the tv, to find Cobblepots warehouse going up in flames. His breaths are heavy, and he sounds pained as he huffs out a sentence.“See that? I did that... Just wanted someone to know.”. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁ ⟡ ݁ . ⊹ ₊ ݁."I would recognize you in total darkness, were you mute and I deaf, I would recognize you in another whole life entirely, in different bodies, different times."

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: chlo_caineandabel

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,105Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: What happens when a lonely girl and boys who's alone meet? They bond. Not because they only have each other, but because they don't understand one another. You were siting alone in the park with seventeen minutes left till midnight. Seventeen minutes left of your birthday. A slightly stale cupcake you received from the bakery that closed ten minutes ago sits beside you on the bench. The moon rolls about in the sky as it slowly takes its place in the dark canvas of the sky. Out of the silence of the night, you hear someone's voice. "What brings you out here so late at night?"

entry.title: Good Luck, Babe.
entry.summary:
Author: teklarn

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,297Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 534

Summary: - ON HIATUS - Born as the heir to a dirty fortune and nothing more, since you could walk you’ve known you’d marry someone for the sake of carrying on your family’s legacy. Trying to find love was never forbidden―it was simply out of the question. There was no point in finding it when you were betrothed to a complete stranger. As the prized and only daughter of Roman Sionis, otherwise known as the infamous crime lord Black Mask, what choice was there to make? Mafia boss Bruce Wayne strikes a deal with your father―join your two incredibly powerful and wealthy families by marrying off the soul heirs. That would be you, and Bruce Wayne’s adopted ‘golden son,’ Richard Grayson. The first time you meet Dick, he’s nothing short of a typical rich kid. Polite in all the ways that mattered, a little arrogant and a little flashy for your taste, but cute nonetheless. But when you meet Dick’s bodyguard, Jason Todd―a reformed criminal paying off his debt to the Waynes―everything changes. Jason is handsome, aloof, dangerous, everything you aren’t allowed to have. And now, he’s suddenly everything you want.

entry.title: Cairo is Gotham 2.0
entry.summary:
Author: Dragoness_H

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,580Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: "I knew it was slightly bad, love, but this is horrible"Jason grumbled with an amused look."It's too early for you to loose your sanity, welcome to cairo, babe"She smirked.OrJason escapes Gotham with his Egyptian wife for a vacation in Egypt because they're tired of the exhausting day to day life in Gotham but their tour in Cairo soon proves them wrong.Orthis was inspired by a TT where a girl was saying that egypt is now real life Gotham, to which I agree.(This is thinly veiled social commentary tbh, I hate what women are going through recently in the Egyptian society so I'm coping thru art)(Love Jason Todd tho)

entry.title: May a Thousand Blossoms Bloom
entry.summary:
Author: ovenbaked_seasalt_cracker

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,874Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 99

Summary: "Does my body make you uncomfortable, Jason?"A cough breaks from his lips, shaking his body as he bends away from you, thumping a fist on his chest."No, no, I--it's just not very common in Gotham for people to go... bare."You catch yourself leaning into his space, and reel yourself back. A small smile plays on your lips at his words. "I didn't know immortal beings were so shy around the natural body. I apologise my lord, I shall cover myself."--Being a flower nymph who stays in the wooded meadow you were born, it isn't everyday you come face-to-face with a man, much less one that crash lands in your forest...-Banned from Gotham, Jason the God of Destruction wakes up in a Lonely Forest far from civilization and stripped of his godly powers. He soon finds himself welcomed into a world filled with Nymphs, and mythical creatures. Will he find a budding love? How will he get his godhood back? All he knows is that there is a semi-naked woman watching his every move as he nurses himself back to health in this meadow.

entry.title: futile devices
entry.summary:
Author: al_lion_e

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,140Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 154

Summary: “That’s gonna get infected.” Comes a voice from down the alley, cold and disinterested. You freeze, and look up. “Oh.” “I mean,” says a man in a recognizable red helmet, “unless you disinfect it. Gothams dumpsters carry germs scientists haven’t even discovered.” He's leaning against the brick wall to your right near the entrance of the alley, his broad, intimidating figure literally blotting out the lights beyond. It's strange to see him so close up- in person, not in blurry photographs in magazines, or on the news.   Or: Encounters.

entry.title: Out Of Your Skin
entry.summary:
Author: Laceys_lab

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,607Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: After leaving Smallville for a fresh start in Gotham, far from a family of heros she can't measure up to. Miss Kent the daughter of Superman tries to carve out a life of her own, far from the shadow of her family’s legacy. Studying law and interning at Arkham Asylum, she’s determined to prove she can stand on her own, even without control over her powers. But everything shifts when Jason Todd now the Red Hood reappears in her life after years of absence. Once her closest childhood friend, Jason is no longer the boy she remembered. Hardened, dangerous, and carrying the weight of death and resurrection, Jason asks for her help uncovering a suspected weapons smuggling operation inside Arkham. Despite her mistrust of his violent methods and the complicated feelings he stirs up he insists he trusts her. Now entangled in a dangerous investigation and drawn back toward a boy she thought she’d lost, she must decide who she is willing to become and whether helping Jason will bring her closer to herself, or further from everything she was raised to believe

entry.title: Baby’s First Creature-Feature
entry.summary:
Author: TheGoldenPath

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,300Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 74

Summary: Excerpt~She’s reading to him, a generator manual that looks well read. The pages are yellow and water stained around her long fingers. His vision lazily trails from the book to his bloodied sheets and back to the stranger. Is he hallucinating a comforting presence to make his reality less burdensome? When had his visions ever been pleasant?A pretty girl to sit by his bedside and comfort him in his death. He tries to reach out and touch her hand, just to see if she’s a fantasy meant to remind him of everything he never fully had only for the pain to jolt up his entire abdomen. Summary~Jason awakes on an alternate earth whose only occupants is a secretive girl and a strange dog. He struggles to bring them home as a presence works in the shadows to control them. He learns the hard way that some secrets are best left alone. Dedicated to all the fawns that had to grow sharp teeth so they could defend themselves❤️

entry.title: Moving Back, Forwards.
entry.summary:
Author: Glitterfangsbullet

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,782Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 50

Summary: You were never supposed to get this close. It was never supposed to matter—whatever this is between you and Jason Todd. Not quite love, not quite nothing. He doesn’t know you, not really.Not the way you know him. And maybe that’s why it works. However the universe has a strange sense of humor, and it keeps reminding you that relshionships built on secrets have an expiration date.And yours is running out.

entry.title: Apartment 3B
entry.summary:
Author: ElaineInABox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,257Chapters: 21/22Kudos: 1,034

Summary: You weren’t looking for love, just somewhere cheap, quiet, and safe enough to get you through the semester. Jason Todd wasn’t looking for company, just a roommate who wouldn’t ask questions about why he came home at two AM bloody and bruised.But in a cramped apartment in Crime Alley, between burnt coffee, leaky ceilings, and the soft hum of the city that never sleeps, the silence between you starts to change. What begins as survival becomes something quieter, steadier—something that almost feels like home.

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,647Chapters: 8/45Kudos: 77

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.

entry.title: DRESS
entry.summary:
Author: houndwolfz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,630Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: Your days are numbered.Trapped by a debt you can’t possibly repay, you're forced into a lethal gamble to clear your name and save your own skin. It’s a high-stakes game where the ultimate prize is none other than the Red Hood.Kidnapping the current owner of the Iceberg Lounge—one of Gotham’s most feared criminals—seems like a plan destined for a body bag, but for you, it’s the only way out. What you didn't plan for was the fallout when you finally came face-to-face with your target.

entry.title: Jason Peter Todd: Psychological Analysis.
entry.summary:
Author: Anxyous_Potato

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,092Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 20

Summary: The following project was made for fun. I'm majoring in Psych and needed a reason to practice my technical writing. Jason is a patient at Arkham Asylum after being taken there for further evaluation by his family, due to his constant panic attacks and rage outbursts that they reported.
